Flat concept inventory:
- Knowledge Mechanisms in LLMs | papers: 7e388155314475226bd001b84d8a9a69f35021a7; f44c1d2f1764bbf186c95af1b3b5a624b9801d18; 184753b614b35cde3f2e221cea3bc60fe016d29e; 6150a2dab1b63b246eb2cd418fcdb5a6b6b8ae62; cf36236015c9f93f15bfafbf282f69e08bdc9c16; 2b72888cc3ff048038f6011b8e3d89ba106540b6; 41a3c41ba1912e1384849e6898c241af89cc4a11; b0ceba96db8b7b71beb2f0906568ffc143fddbf9; d9a449e1123ca37375c9977f51b7ea6129905803; 33c8910107f3fcb17d140cc88554652508ae3674; 2c871df72c52b58f05447fcb3afc838168d94505; 4a54d58a4b20e4f3af25cea3c188a12082a95e02; e6ecbf7b24fd10406416cd5e4e6c2839277f03a2; 96edfa3441bb3624ea2b8bdfc5eec2c87efa9637; 996445d847f06e99b0bd259345408a0cf1bce87e; 5c6eeda9cce18e6d468c1b8835e4161a0d789647; e0095740512aa1b1e991b6ee920ccba7f8beb569; eefbd8b384a58f464827b19e30a6920ba976def9; 405f8f5f1c6df1b3343c812832479aad5180b65f; c0d9a48547d728dd320b453b01a0ab1ce2f96098; 9cf6d8ad63fd43658d4cdae58a78013852a759ff; 6edd112383ad494f5f2eba72b6f4ffae122ce61f; 133b97e40017a9bbbadd10bcd7f13088a97ca3cc; f1481b4eba72c1e1d355413af37352a0bcfc50e9; d8355d1bc02ca6b11125027a5d85d0b32fa30f66; 5dc15ac1c92ab7492f121471823fb13a95d273ba; b13947c7598aa91992cf04048afa19c7cfe69795; 26089bdfdbca1e6eaaceca71e3116b715bec6d47; 231c1fee5f0e48722f025961bf3016ca5e4c6072; 75f7e9e2b59fb640ef9d1dff94097175daf46c4d; aec826ff336ca442697d5f908ab1668f1ea18987; 97994e4526ef7eeea59190aa466fbab05fad9187; 5b1120f547d3969afc49b4a094e874d568e53aca; 9e7227ae2fbccc4c54f986d4e72eae5d0f66387a; 203a297db586ffb4cd858fe5f219a9a1571c87b2; 2b18e63caff82f1a688714aed099b8856db92581; 0c4f46e4dcae5527018e6432fb60cfe8c3354e97; d96933cba676edbaad3a0564352ad29dbfe2c1f4; 8c5aab75826620559d33e99652f4cac9f6efd2fc; 77805d75199e7b9e580b4827f56a069ba0ddd13f; 7b1a6db0909856a345f055a9607f43711b3df375; 5cd671efa2af8456c615c5faf54d1be4950f3819; 8c682857a38a0984f12cb2fb612a79aad6f98d3c; 4a2f4cd788896d9e9b52eaf5ca303c5cdcb280c6; 546d0624adfc6e18fb87d8cc77e7705bb9ea7445; 6052486bc9144dc1730c12bf35323af3792a1fd0; ca31b8584b6c022ef15ddfe994fe361e002b7729; e01ab53663e5df5961a021506a9cb09f4efc3788; eed787154cd7ae521d32033a599e48184e09b058; 7b7649b59d62d2ebfb3c34b7bc91204b9b7cefe8; 0d1c76d45afa012ded7ab741194baf142117c495; 7a15950dc71079285a4eaf195de5aadd87c41b40; 0286b2736a114198b25fb5553c671c33aed5d477; f0950a3f27c0fefffba60ae1c9a8ee360d5eb55f; c0d8e5ee66c279299012cc3b8d0519011b3f4998; c3f1fae241a3c2449e675ab750873d800f95513c; 600ff4c4ae9fc506c86673c5ecce4fa90803e987; b512451d431df9e411bea4c99f7135d010275445; 94034fd2ed4b6cf41113abb7adc9ae469313c958; f091acf9dc2cc486c253dcead3a74ba916c64eb7; 4308208fac24626e0c927ee728038aadc4e87266; ae16c93bf3a33c43e8f57293530069e77c89bcaa; 42016f91e5b1da63174d45acb96bc89b64aa124d; 0251bb95be75d472c8d5b873751615e7fe2feb1d; 1bda8efbbf4abae6c8c1da97d6137396807b1e09; aac3469581061cd5b46440c3eeca91c385d54ccf; 8b750488d139f9beba0815ff8f46ebe15ebb3e58; f5b077e01f6e3d91f58cb4ed7158fa61eec5a1f8; 4747e72c5bc706c50e76953188f0144df18992d0; 385c74957858e7d6856d48e72b5a902b4c1aa28c; 66de49b3dcbbf0cca535335d597f94b702e2b95a; ead6121fbc787d508dc6a6d7106f72bf0d647d03
- Knowledge Utilization | papers: 7e388155314475226bd001b84d8a9a69f35021a7; f44c1d2f1764bbf186c95af1b3b5a624b9801d18; 184753b614b35cde3f2e221cea3bc60fe016d29e; 6150a2dab1b63b246eb2cd418fcdb5a6b6b8ae62; cf36236015c9f93f15bfafbf282f69e08bdc9c16; 2b72888cc3ff048038f6011b8e3d89ba106540b6; 41a3c41ba1912e1384849e6898c241af89cc4a11; b0ceba96db8b7b71beb2f0906568ffc143fddbf9; d9a449e1123ca37375c9977f51b7ea6129905803; 33c8910107f3fcb17d140cc88554652508ae3674; 2c871df72c52b58f05447fcb3afc838168d94505; 4a54d58a4b20e4f3af25cea3c188a12082a95e02; e6ecbf7b24fd10406416cd5e4e6c2839277f03a2; 96edfa3441bb3624ea2b8bdfc5eec2c87efa9637; 996445d847f06e99b0bd259345408a0cf1bce87e; 5c6eeda9cce18e6d468c1b8835e4161a0d789647; e0095740512aa1b1e991b6ee920ccba7f8beb569; eefbd8b384a58f464827b19e30a6920ba976def9; 405f8f5f1c6df1b3343c812832479aad5180b65f; c0d9a48547d728dd320b453b01a0ab1ce2f96098; 9cf6d8ad63fd43658d4cdae58a78013852a759ff; 6edd112383ad494f5f2eba72b6f4ffae122ce61f; 133b97e40017a9bbbadd10bcd7f13088a97ca3cc; f1481b4eba72c1e1d355413af37352a0bcfc50e9; d8355d1bc02ca6b11125027a5d85d0b32fa30f66; 5dc15ac1c92ab7492f121471823fb13a95d273ba; b13947c7598aa91992cf04048afa19c7cfe69795; 26089bdfdbca1e6eaaceca71e3116b715bec6d47; 231c1fee5f0e48722f025961bf3016ca5e4c6072; 75f7e9e2b59fb640ef9d1dff94097175daf46c4d; aec826ff336ca442697d5f908ab1668f1ea18987; 97994e4526ef7eeea59190aa466fbab05fad9187; 5b1120f547d3969afc49b4a094e874d568e53aca; 9e7227ae2fbccc4c54f986d4e72eae5d0f66387a; 203a297db586ffb4cd858fe5f219a9a1571c87b2; 2b18e63caff82f1a688714aed099b8856db92581; 0c4f46e4dcae5527018e6432fb60cfe8c3354e97; d96933cba676edbaad3a0564352ad29dbfe2c1f4; 8c5aab75826620559d33e99652f4cac9f6efd2fc; 77805d75199e7b9e580b4827f56a069ba0ddd13f; 7b1a6db0909856a345f055a9607f43711b3df375; 5cd671efa2af8456c615c5faf54d1be4950f3819; 8c682857a38a0984f12cb2fb612a79aad6f98d3c; 4a2f4cd788896d9e9b52eaf5ca303c5cdcb280c6
- Memorization | papers: 7e388155314475226bd001b84d8a9a69f35021a7; f44c1d2f1764bbf186c95af1b3b5a624b9801d18; 184753b614b35cde3f2e221cea3bc60fe016d29e; 6150a2dab1b63b246eb2cd418fcdb5a6b6b8ae62; cf36236015c9f93f15bfafbf282f69e08bdc9c16; 2b72888cc3ff048038f6011b8e3d89ba106540b6; 41a3c41ba1912e1384849e6898c241af89cc4a11; b0ceba96db8b7b71beb2f0906568ffc143fddbf9; d9a449e1123ca37375c9977f51b7ea6129905803; 33c8910107f3fcb17d140cc88554652508ae3674; 2c871df72c52b58f05447fcb3afc838168d94505; 4a54d58a4b20e4f3af25cea3c188a12082a95e02; e6ecbf7b24fd10406416cd5e4e6c2839277f03a2; 96edfa3441bb3624ea2b8bdfc5eec2c87efa9637; 996445d847f06e99b0bd259345408a0cf1bce87e; 5c6eeda9cce18e6d468c1b8835e4161a0d789647; e0095740512aa1b1e991b6ee920ccba7f8beb569; eefbd8b384a58f464827b19e30a6920ba976def9; 405f8f5f1c6df1b3343c812832479aad5180b65f; c0d9a48547d728dd320b453b01a0ab1ce2f96098; 9cf6d8ad63fd43658d4cdae58a78013852a759ff; 6edd112383ad494f5f2eba72b6f4ffae122ce61f; 133b97e40017a9bbbadd10bcd7f13088a97ca3cc; f1481b4eba72c1e1d355413af37352a0bcfc50e9
- Modular Region | papers: 7e388155314475226bd001b84d8a9a69f35021a7; f44c1d2f1764bbf186c95af1b3b5a624b9801d18; 184753b614b35cde3f2e221cea3bc60fe016d29e; 6150a2dab1b63b246eb2cd418fcdb5a6b6b8ae62; cf36236015c9f93f15bfafbf282f69e08bdc9c16; 2b72888cc3ff048038f6011b8e3d89ba106540b6; 41a3c41ba1912e1384849e6898c241af89cc4a11; b0ceba96db8b7b71beb2f0906568ffc143fddbf9; d9a449e1123ca37375c9977f51b7ea6129905803; 33c8910107f3fcb17d140cc88554652508ae3674; 2c871df72c52b58f05447fcb3afc838168d94505; 4a54d58a4b20e4f3af25cea3c188a12082a95e02; e6ecbf7b24fd10406416cd5e4e6c2839277f03a2; 96edfa3441bb3624ea2b8bdfc5eec2c87efa9637; 996445d847f06e99b0bd259345408a0cf1bce87e; 5c6eeda9cce18e6d468c1b8835e4161a0d789647; e0095740512aa1b1e991b6ee920ccba7f8beb569
- Connection | papers: eefbd8b384a58f464827b19e30a6920ba976def9; 405f8f5f1c6df1b3343c812832479aad5180b65f; c0d9a48547d728dd320b453b01a0ab1ce2f96098; 9cf6d8ad63fd43658d4cdae58a78013852a759ff; 6edd112383ad494f5f2eba72b6f4ffae122ce61f; 133b97e40017a9bbbadd10bcd7f13088a97ca3cc; f1481b4eba72c1e1d355413af37352a0bcfc50e9
- Comprehension \& Application | papers: d8355d1bc02ca6b11125027a5d85d0b32fa30f66; 5dc15ac1c92ab7492f121471823fb13a95d273ba; 405f8f5f1c6df1b3343c812832479aad5180b65f; b13947c7598aa91992cf04048afa19c7cfe69795; 9cf6d8ad63fd43658d4cdae58a78013852a759ff; 26089bdfdbca1e6eaaceca71e3116b715bec6d47; 231c1fee5f0e48722f025961bf3016ca5e4c6072; 96edfa3441bb3624ea2b8bdfc5eec2c87efa9637; 75f7e9e2b59fb640ef9d1dff94097175daf46c4d; e0095740512aa1b1e991b6ee920ccba7f8beb569; aec826ff336ca442697d5f908ab1668f1ea18987; c0d9a48547d728dd320b453b01a0ab1ce2f96098; 97994e4526ef7eeea59190aa466fbab05fad9187; 5b1120f547d3969afc49b4a094e874d568e53aca
- Reusing Module | papers: d8355d1bc02ca6b11125027a5d85d0b32fa30f66; 5dc15ac1c92ab7492f121471823fb13a95d273ba; 405f8f5f1c6df1b3343c812832479aad5180b65f; b13947c7598aa91992cf04048afa19c7cfe69795; 9cf6d8ad63fd43658d4cdae58a78013852a759ff; 26089bdfdbca1e6eaaceca71e3116b715bec6d47; 231c1fee5f0e48722f025961bf3016ca5e4c6072; 96edfa3441bb3624ea2b8bdfc5eec2c87efa9637; 75f7e9e2b59fb640ef9d1dff94097175daf46c4d; e0095740512aa1b1e991b6ee920ccba7f8beb569; aec826ff336ca442697d5f908ab1668f1ea18987

- Creation | papers: 9e7227ae2fbccc4c54f986d4e72eae5d0f66387a; 203a297db586ffb4cd858fe5f219a9a1571c87b2; 2b18e63caff82f1a688714aed099b8856db92581; 0c4f46e4dcae5527018e6432fb60cfe8c3354e97; d96933cba676edbaad3a0564352ad29dbfe2c1f4; 8c5aab75826620559d33e99652f4cac9f6efd2fc; 77805d75199e7b9e580b4827f56a069ba0ddd13f; 7b1a6db0909856a345f055a9607f43711b3df375; 5cd671efa2af8456c615c5faf54d1be4950f3819; 8c682857a38a0984f12cb2fb612a79aad6f98d3c; 4a2f4cd788896d9e9b52eaf5ca303c5cdcb280c6
- Novel | papers: 9e7227ae2fbccc4c54f986d4e72eae5d0f66387a; 203a297db586ffb4cd858fe5f219a9a1571c87b2; 2b18e63caff82f1a688714aed099b8856db92581; 0c4f46e4dcae5527018e6432fb60cfe8c3354e97; d96933cba676edbaad3a0564352ad29dbfe2c1f4; 8c5aab75826620559d33e99652f4cac9f6efd2fc; 77805d75199e7b9e580b4827f56a069ba0ddd13f

- Knowledge Evolution | papers: 546d0624adfc6e18fb87d8cc77e7705bb9ea7445; 6052486bc9144dc1730c12bf35323af3792a1fd0; ca31b8584b6c022ef15ddfe994fe361e002b7729; e01ab53663e5df5961a021506a9cb09f4efc3788; eed787154cd7ae521d32033a599e48184e09b058; 7b7649b59d62d2ebfb3c34b7bc91204b9b7cefe8; 0d1c76d45afa012ded7ab741194baf142117c495; 7a15950dc71079285a4eaf195de5aadd87c41b40; 0286b2736a114198b25fb5553c671c33aed5d477; f0950a3f27c0fefffba60ae1c9a8ee360d5eb55f; c0d8e5ee66c279299012cc3b8d0519011b3f4998; c3f1fae241a3c2449e675ab750873d800f95513c; 600ff4c4ae9fc506c86673c5ecce4fa90803e987; b512451d431df9e411bea4c99f7135d010275445; 94034fd2ed4b6cf41113abb7adc9ae469313c958; f091acf9dc2cc486c253dcead3a74ba916c64eb7; 4308208fac24626e0c927ee728038aadc4e87266; ae16c93bf3a33c43e8f57293530069e77c89bcaa; cf36236015c9f93f15bfafbf282f69e08bdc9c16; 42016f91e5b1da63174d45acb96bc89b64aa124d; 0251bb95be75d472c8d5b873751615e7fe2feb1d; 1bda8efbbf4abae6c8c1da97d6137396807b1e09; aac3469581061cd5b46440c3eeca91c385d54ccf; 8b750488d139f9beba0815ff8f46ebe15ebb3e58; f5b077e01f6e3d91f58cb4ed7158fa61eec5a1f8; 4747e72c5bc706c50e76953188f0144df18992d0; 385c74957858e7d6856d48e72b5a902b4c1aa28c; 66de49b3dcbbf0cca535335d597f94b702e2b95a; ead6121fbc787d508dc6a6d7106f72bf0d647d03
- Individual Evolution | papers: 546d0624adfc6e18fb87d8cc77e7705bb9ea7445; 6052486bc9144dc1730c12bf35323af3792a1fd0; ca31b8584b6c022ef15ddfe994fe361e002b7729; e01ab53663e5df5961a021506a9cb09f4efc3788; eed787154cd7ae521d32033a599e48184e09b058; 7b7649b59d62d2ebfb3c34b7bc91204b9b7cefe8; 0d1c76d45afa012ded7ab741194baf142117c495; 7a15950dc71079285a4eaf195de5aadd87c41b40; 0286b2736a114198b25fb5553c671c33aed5d477; f0950a3f27c0fefffba60ae1c9a8ee360d5eb55f; c0d8e5ee66c279299012cc3b8d0519011b3f4998; c3f1fae241a3c2449e675ab750873d800f95513c; 600ff4c4ae9fc506c86673c5ecce4fa90803e987; b512451d431df9e411bea4c99f7135d010275445; 94034fd2ed4b6cf41113abb7adc9ae469313c958; f091acf9dc2cc486c253dcead3a74ba916c64eb7; 4308208fac24626e0c927ee728038aadc4e87266; ae16c93bf3a33c43e8f57293530069e77c89bcaa; cf36236015c9f93f15bfafbf282f69e08bdc9c16; 42016f91e5b1da63174d45acb96bc89b64aa124d; 0251bb95be75d472c8d5b873751615e7fe2feb1d; 1bda8efbbf4abae6c8c1da97d6137396807b1e09; aac3469581061cd5b46440c3eeca91c385d54ccf
- Pre-training | papers: 546d0624adfc6e18fb87d8cc77e7705bb9ea7445; 6052486bc9144dc1730c12bf35323af3792a1fd0; ca31b8584b6c022ef15ddfe994fe361e002b7729; e01ab53663e5df5961a021506a9cb09f4efc3788; eed787154cd7ae521d32033a599e48184e09b058; 7b7649b59d62d2ebfb3c34b7bc91204b9b7cefe8
- Post-training | papers: 0d1c76d45afa012ded7ab741194baf142117c495; 7a15950dc71079285a4eaf195de5aadd87c41b40; 0286b2736a114198b25fb5553c671c33aed5d477; f0950a3f27c0fefffba60ae1c9a8ee360d5eb55f; c0d8e5ee66c279299012cc3b8d0519011b3f4998; c3f1fae241a3c2449e675ab750873d800f95513c; 600ff4c4ae9fc506c86673c5ecce4fa90803e987; b512451d431df9e411bea4c99f7135d010275445; 94034fd2ed4b6cf41113abb7adc9ae469313c958; f091acf9dc2cc486c253dcead3a74ba916c64eb7; 4308208fac24626e0c927ee728038aadc4e87266; ae16c93bf3a33c43e8f57293530069e77c89bcaa; cf36236015c9f93f15bfafbf282f69e08bdc9c16; 42016f91e5b1da63174d45acb96bc89b64aa124d; 0251bb95be75d472c8d5b873751615e7fe2feb1d; 1bda8efbbf4abae6c8c1da97d6137396807b1e09; aac3469581061cd5b46440c3eeca91c385d54ccf
- Fine-tuning | papers: 0d1c76d45afa012ded7ab741194baf142117c495; 7a15950dc71079285a4eaf195de5aadd87c41b40; 0286b2736a114198b25fb5553c671c33aed5d477; f0950a3f27c0fefffba60ae1c9a8ee360d5eb55f; c0d8e5ee66c279299012cc3b8d0519011b3f4998; c3f1fae241a3c2449e675ab750873d800f95513c; 600ff4c4ae9fc506c86673c5ecce4fa90803e987; b512451d431df9e411bea4c99f7135d010275445
- RAG | papers: 94034fd2ed4b6cf41113abb7adc9ae469313c958; f091acf9dc2cc486c253dcead3a74ba916c64eb7; 4308208fac24626e0c927ee728038aadc4e87266
- Editing | papers: ae16c93bf3a33c43e8f57293530069e77c89bcaa; cf36236015c9f93f15bfafbf282f69e08bdc9c16; 42016f91e5b1da63174d45acb96bc89b64aa124d; 0251bb95be75d472c8d5b873751615e7fe2feb1d; 1bda8efbbf4abae6c8c1da97d6137396807b1e09; aac3469581061cd5b46440c3eeca91c385d54ccf
- Group Evolution | papers: 8b750488d139f9beba0815ff8f46ebe15ebb3e58; f5b077e01f6e3d91f58cb4ed7158fa61eec5a1f8; 4747e72c5bc706c50e76953188f0144df18992d0; 385c74957858e7d6856d48e72b5a902b4c1aa28c; 66de49b3dcbbf0cca535335d597f94b702e2b95a; ead6121fbc787d508dc6a6d7106f72bf0d647d03
